Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer."}},"stateVariables":{"MAX_CASHOUT_MULTIPLIER_BPS":{"details":"Caps the maximum possible payout to prevent vault drainage"}},"title":"CrashGame","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"BPS()":{"notice":"BPS denominator"},"HOUSE_EDGE_NUMERATOR()":{"notice":"House edge applied to crash point (98/100 = 2% edge)"},"MAX_CASHOUT_MULTIPLIER_BPS()":{"notice":"Maximum cash-out multiplier in BPS (100x = 1_000_000 BPS)"},"MAX_PLAYERS_PER_ROUND()":{"notice":"Maximum players per round"},"MIN_CRASH_BPS()":{"notice":"Minimum crash point (1.00x in BPS = 10000)"},"ROUND_TIMEOUT()":{"notice":"Timeout for a running round (operator must crash within this window)"},"beginRound(uint256)":{"notice":"Transition from betting to running state"},"bettingDuration()":{"notice":"Duration of betting window in seconds"},"cancelRound(uint256)":{"notice":"Cancel a round (e.g., if no players joined). Refunds all bets."},"cashOut(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Cash out at the current multiplier during a running round.         The multiplier is passed by the caller and validated."},"claimRoundTimeout(uint256)":{"notice":"Claim refund if the operator failed to crash a running round within ROUND_TIMEOUT.         Can be called by anyone. Refunds all player bets."},"crashRound(uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"End a round by revealing the server seed. Computes crash point and settles all bets."},"currentRoundId()":{"notice":"Current round ID"},"operator()":{"notice":"House operator who manages rounds"},"paused()":{"notice":"Whether the game is paused"},"placeBet(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Place a bet in the current round during betting window"},"placeBetWithSession(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Place a bet using a session key"},"playerBetIndex(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Player bet index in round: roundId => player => betIndex (1-indexed, 0 = no bet)"},"roundBets(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Player bets per round: roundId => index => PlayerBet"},"rounds(uint256)":{"notice":"Round data"},"startRound(bytes32)":{"notice":"Start a new round. The operator commits a server seed hash."},"verifyCrashPoint(bytes32,uint256)":{"notice":"Verify that a crash point was fairly computed"}},"notice":"Multiplier crash game where players cash out before the crash point.  Round flow:   1. Operator starts a new round with a commitment hash   2. Players place bets during the betting window   3. Round begins (no more bets)   4. Multiplier increases. Players call cashOut() to lock in their multiplier.   5. Operator reveals the crash point (provably fair via commit-reveal)   6. Players who cashed out below the crash point win.      Players who didn't cash out or cashed out above crash point acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params.multiplierBps: The multiplier to cash out at (in BPS, e.g., 15000 = 1.50x)

params.serverSeed: The server seed (must hash to serverCommitHash)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

HOUSE_EDGE_NUMERATOR().notice: House edge applied to crash point (98/100 = 2% edge)

MAX_CASHOUT_MULTIPLIER_BPS().notice: Maximum cash-out multiplier in BPS (100x = 1_000_000 BPS)

ROUND_TIMEOUT().notice: Timeout for a running round (operator must crash within this window)

beginRound(uint256).notice: Transition from betting to running state

bettingDuration().notice: Duration of betting window in seconds

cancelRound(uint256).notice: Cancel a round (e.g., if no players joined). Refunds all bets.

cashOut(uint256,uint256).notice: Cash out at the current multiplier during a running round.         The multiplier is passed by the caller and validated.

claimRoundTimeout(uint256).notice: Claim refund if the operator failed to crash a running round within ROUND_TIMEOUT.         Can be called by anyone. Refunds all player bets.

crashRound(uint256,bytes32).notice: End a round by revealing the server seed. Computes crash point and settles all bets.

placeBet(uint256,uint256).notice: Place a bet in the current round during betting window

placeBetWithSession(uint256,uint256,uint.notice: Place a bet using a session key

playerBetIndex(uint256,address).notice: Player bet index in round: roundId => player => betIndex (1-indexed, 0 = no bet)

roundBets(uint256,uint256).notice: Player bets per round: roundId => index => PlayerBet

startRound(bytes32).notice: Start a new round. The operator commits a server seed hash.

verifyCrashPoint(bytes32,uint256).notice: Verify that a crash point was fairly computed
